title: Onyx SMP
description: A modpack crafted to combine technology and RPG elements while focusing on the social aspect of minecraft.
body:
# ONYX SMP
This is a modpack that has it main focus on the class system of [spell engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine) and it's addon such as archers, paladins & priests, wizards... etc.

Before even starting you will be given a choice of an origin which will change your gameplay in various of ways! Such as becoming the undead revenant from the medieval origins mod!

There are multiple ways to play the modpack, while you could only focus on adventuring there are amazing mods that add automation: Create is the sole technology mod of this modpack and on the other hand Botania is the main magic-tech mod.

Player interaction is a big part of this modpack and with mods like paladins furniture, the let's do series and waterframes you can make the perfect hangout place!
Watch a youtube vide with your friends while you enjoy your comfortable couch alongside good food!

At last I wanted a good player customization, while other hat mods could work I decided to include Armourer's workshop, a mod where you can build your accesories in game and then wear them!
